title: Chromastone Alien Evolution JAR
description: Modrinth version of Chromastone addon for Alien Evolution
body:
Chromastone addon as a jar, has everything that the addon variant has and more.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/chromastone-ae

You can play either versions for basically the same experience with minor rebalancing and interaction changes.

In the Alien Evo discord there is a thread describing what he can absorb and what his moves do. This is the current mod compatiblity:
Mowzie's mobs, Inka, Iron's Spells & Spellbooks, Traveloptics, L'enders Cataclysm, Cataclysm spellbooks, Jujutsucraft, Roundabout jojo mod, Ice and fire, Twilight Forest, Born in chaos, Terramity, Mekanism, Alexscaves, Alexsmobs, Mahou Tsukai, Foolish, Dungeon now loading, Ars nouveau, Legendary Monsters, Orbital Laser canon, Botania, Blueskies, Grimoireofgaia, CursedFate,  MegaTimestopClock, Fsang, OmniExtras, The Five Project, Buzzshock, Deus Chrono-Machina, Fulmini A Rise, Cursedfate, Sunlight Zombie, Mutant Monsters, Aliens:Untapped. 

I, myself will post a video explaining what he does, what he can absorb. I would not like for other people to make a review on it, up until i've atleast posted the video or am satisfied with his release.

IF you are switching from the zip version from below 1.8.2, know that the registry has been changed to be seperate from alienevo. So you need to re-unlock him, and recal addon and omnivere addon compatiblity will come later.

Special thanks to 

Ender2466, Ultimate evolution dev, for compiling the first version for 1.0.7 AE
Spidey for compiling the second version for 1.1 AE
Debonmoy for adding color customization, fixing the badge geo
Doggertoon for the sugilite_crystal icon
Quill for the chromastone obtainment (soon to have collaboration)
Stephen for making the model, from which i just added abilities
Gorlomi for the abilities that i lowkey scrapped
Mc_charles, superjon! for finalizing the stats for chromastone 
Frogboi for new icons
Quill for helping making this into a jar
